heading: Tonight
text: Mostly cloudy. Evening showers or a thunderstorm north, isolated south, diminishing overnight. Lows in the upper 40s and 50s. Winds west 10 to 15 mph, gusting to 25 mph.

heading: Saturday
text: Mostly cloudy, with a good chance of showers north. Periods of sun, a passing shower south. Highs in the 60s to near 70 north, in the 70s for the Champlain Valley and south. Winds west 10 to 15 mph, gusting to 25 mph.

heading: Saturday Night
text: Periods of clouds. A good chance of evening showers north, isolated south, diminishing overnight. Lows in the upper 40s and 50s. Winds diminishing to light and variable.

heading: Sunday
text: Periods of sun, a passing shower south, and a better chance north. Highs in the 60s to near 70 north, in the 70s for the Champlain Valley and south. Winds light and variable.
